TWO-BEDROOM CORNER RESIDENCE  ·  MANASTIRI BAY RESORT
GUIDE PRICE€ 456,960

The Residence

The flagship of this collection — a two-bedroom corner residence on the upper floor, generous in scale and open to the bay on two sides. A large living and dining space anchors the home, with two private bedrooms, a dressing room and a balcony that follows the light through the day. The fullest expression of life at Manastiri Bay, between Lake Butrint and the Ionian Sea.
